sql_array: CREATE TABLE remote_users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), email VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO remote_users (id, name, email) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 'john.doe@example.com');
UPDATE remote_users SET email = 'john.new@example.com' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM remote_users WHERE email LIKE '%example.com';
SELECT rstmtexec('UPDATE remote_users SET name = ''Jane Doe'' WHERE id = 1;');
